response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 15+ years across stacks and a current role touching AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which aligns with the agentic/MCP focus of the role. However, demonstrated GenAI production experience appears limited to roughly the last year at re:cinq, Python is not listed in skills, and there is no explicit evidence of RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation, or large-scale cloud AI system delivery. Worth a screening call to probe depth of recent AI work and Python proficiency before committing to an onsite.
strengths: Current hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Deep TypeScript/Node.js background and broad polyglot experience across web, backend, and embedded
Long track record of shipping production systems, including high-throughput services and platform/infrastructure work
concerns: Python is not listed among skills; AI experience is concentrated in only the most recent ~1 year
No explicit experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed consulting responsibilities expected at staff level

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG, vector DB, and Python signals
